<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-māu]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[hak:Kui-mâu]][[ja:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[vi:Quý Mão]][[za:Gveiqmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-báu]][[zh-yue:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-māu]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[hak:Kui-mâu]][[ja:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[vi:Quý Mão]][[za:Gveiqmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-báu]][[zh-yue:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-māu]][[de:Wasser-Hase]][[hak:Kui-mâu]][[ja:癸卯]][[ko:계묘]][[vi:Quý Mão]][[za:Gveiqmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-báu]][[zh-yue:癸卯]][[zh:癸卯]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rabbit|kanji=癸卯|romaji=mizunoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=guǐmǎo|w=kuei-mao|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 maau5|j=gwai2 maau5|ci=kʷɐi maːu̯|mc=kjwɨj maw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Water Rabbit''', also known as '''Kibō''' (癸卯, Mizunotō, Kisui no Usagi, Kisui no U, Kibō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 40th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Ren Yin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|壬寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Jia Chen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, creating a {{ill|Aioi|en|Aioi|WD=Q4697552|lt=Five Elements#Mutual generation|1=Aioi}} (Water generates Wood) relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Kisui-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: kimi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-myo (계묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão

<!--
==
* Yin Water Rabbit (癸卯) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 maau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのとうさぎ (mizunoto-usagi)
***Onyomi: きかのうさぎ (kika-no-usagi)
***Onyomi: きぼう (kibō)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemyo
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mão

-->
==Years of Yin Water Rabbit==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 43 are considered Yin Water Rabbit years.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of the Yin Water Rabbit'''
|-
!{{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st millennium|1=1st millennium}}!!{{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium|1=2nd millennium}}!!{{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|43|en|43|WD=Q4637890|lt=43|1=43}}
* {{ill|103|en|103|WD=Q395849|lt=103|1=103}}
* {{ill|163|en|163|WD=Q30384|lt=163|1=163}}
* {{ill|223|en|223|WD=Q31243|lt=223|1=223}}
* {{ill|283|en|283|WD=Q32054|lt=283|1=283}}
* {{ill|343|en|343|WD=Q32680|lt=343|1=343}}
* {{ill|403|en|403|WD=Q32757|lt=403|1=403}}
* {{ill|463|en|463|WD=Q30299|lt=463|1=463}}
* {{ill|523|en|523|WD=Q31642|lt=523|1=523}}
* {{ill|583|en|583|WD=Q32183|lt=583|1=583}}
* {{ill|643|en|643|WD=Q31634|lt=643|1=643}}
* {{ill|703|en|703|WD=Q23500|lt=703|1=703}}
* {{ill|763|en|763|WD=Q30692|lt=763|1=763}}
* {{ill|823|en|823|WD=Q29944|lt=823|1=823}}
* {{ill|883|en|883|WD=Q30355|lt=883|1=883}}
* {{ill|943|en|943|WD=Q24179|lt=943|1=943}}
|
* {{ill|1003|en|1003|WD=Q19224|lt=1003|1=1003}}
* {{ill|1063|en|1063|WD=Q19400|lt=1063|1=1063}}
* {{ill|1123|en|1123|WD=Q23998|lt=1123|1=1123}}
* {{ill|1183|en|1183|WD=Q19723|lt=1183|1=1183}}
* {{ill|1243|en|1243|WD=Q5438|lt=1243|1=1243}}
* {{ill|1303|en|1303|WD=Q5614|lt=1303|1=1303}}
* {{ill|1363|en|1363|WD=Q6176|lt=1363|1=1363}}
* {{ill|1423|en|1423|WD=Q6267|lt=1423|1=1423}}
* {{ill|1483|en|1483|WD=Q6637|lt=1483|1=1483}}
* {{ill|1543|en|1543|WD=Q6523|lt=1543|1=1543}}
* {{ill|1603|en|1603|WD=Q6735|lt=1603|1=1603}}
* {{ill|1663|en|1663|WD=Q7577|lt=1663|1=1663}}
* {{ill|1723|en|1723|WD=Q6921|lt=1723|1=1723}}
* {{ill|1783|en|1783|WD=Q7745|lt=1783|1=1783}}
* {{ill|1843|en|1843|WD=Q7629|lt=1843|1=1843}}
* {{ill|1903|en|1903|WD=Q2045|lt=1903|1=1903}}
* {{ill|1963|en|1963|WD=Q2755|lt=1963|1=1963}}
|
* {{ill|2023|en|2023|WD=Q49622|lt=2023|1=2023}}
* {{ill|2083|en|2083|WD=Q972505|lt=2083|1=2083}}
* [[:en:2143|2143]]
* [[:en:2203|2203]]
* [[:en:2263|2263]]
* [[:en:2323|2323]]
* [[:en:2383|2383]]
* [[:en:2443|2443]]
* [[2503]]
* [[2563]]
* [[2623]]
* [[2683]]
* [[2743]]
* [[2803]]
* [[2863]]
* [[:en:2923|2923]]
* [[:en:2983|2983]]
|}

==Months of Yin Water Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Water Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe|1=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Water Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Water Rabbit days are the 11th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

== References ==
{{Reflist|qq=}}

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Sin-chá]]
[[zh-yue:辛未]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Water Rabbit|qq=ja|癸卯|version=98658182|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Sin-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Feuer-Ziegenevi]]
[[de:Yin Water Rabbit]]

[[ja:癸卯]]
[[zh:癸卯]]
[[ko:계묘]]
[[fr:Lièvre de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Hase]]

[[af:Vuurbok (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Ziegeneen]]
[[en:Fire Goat]]
[[fr:Chèvre de feushak]]
[[it:Sin-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:신미 (간지)]]
[[vi:Tân Mùi]]
[[za:Sincceij]]
[[zh:辛未]]
[[ar:Yin Water Rabbit]]

<!--Yin Water Rabbit--><!--Yin Water Rabbit-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Waterkonyn (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-māu]]
[[hak:Kui-mâu]]
[[vi:Quý Mão]]
[[za:Gveiqmaux]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-báu]]
[[zh-yue:癸卯]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Waterkonyn (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-māu]]
[[hak:Kui-mâu]]
[[vi:Quý Mão]]
[[za:Gveiqmaux]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-báu]]
[[zh-yue:癸卯]]
{{wikidata link|Q904471}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
